name: popover
description: A click-triggered floating panel anchored to a trigger (WAI-ARIA dialog-popover, Radix model); positioned by @floating-ui/dom with offset + flip + shift, Escape + click-outside to dismiss, optional focus trap.
docs:
Register by importing components/ui/popover.ts from your entry point. Slot the trigger in slot="trigger" and the panel body in slot="content": `Open
Body
`. Set `placement` (default bottom), `disabled`, or `trap-focus` to cycle Tab within the panel. Listen for `lv-open`/`lv-close`.
